message:
MVCC algorithmic improvements across seven subsystems

bocpd.rs: Fix per-run-length hazard evaluation — previously the hazard
function was evaluated once at index 0 and reused for all entries. Now
hazard.evaluate(i) is called per entry, which is mathematically correct
for non-constant hazard functions.

conformal_martingale.rs: Trailing whitespace cleanup.

flat_combining.rs: Convert to true non-blocking flat combining. The
combine() method renamed to combine_locked() (caller holds lock).
FcHandle::execute() now uses try_lock() instead of blocking, with
spinning on local cache-line slot on contention. Eliminates context
switches that defeated the purpose of flat combining.

retry_policy.rs: Add discounted Thompson Sampling (0.95 forgetting
factor on alpha/beta), regime-aware posterior reset when regime changes
are detected, and Gittins Index Approximation (UCB) for
exploration-exploitation in retry candidate selection.

rowid_alloc.rs: Add exhaustion guard in notify_explicit_rowid() —
early Err(Exhausted) if next_rowid < 1 to prevent allocator revival
after wrapping past MAX.

shared_lock_table.rs: Fix stale draining-table recovery — finalize
pending drain if the draining table has reached quiescence, instead
of bailing forever. Change best-effort rebuild timeout from ZERO to
1ms for one yield opportunity.

sketch_telemetry.rs: Implement Conservative Update for Count-Min
Sketch — only increase counters below min_estimate + count, providing
tighter overestimation bounds at zero additional memory cost.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
